channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BFFL] Grameva Ltd: Open Offer by Acquirers for 26.00% Stake at Rs. 30/- per Share
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Grameva Ltd, formerly known as Bangalore Fort Farms Limited, has received a Letter of Offer from VC Corporate Advisors Pvt Ltd on behalf of the Acquirers. The Acquirers, namely Mrs. Maneesha Singh, Jagsakti Merchandise Private Limited, and Ros Advisory Private Limited, aim to acquire up to 12,47,844 equity shares of Grameva Ltd, representing 26.00% of the total paid-up equity and voting share capital. The offer price is set at Rs. 30/- per equity share, payable in cash. This offer is being made pursuant to the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. No regulatory or statutory approvals are pending as of the date of this Letter of Offer.

  • Grameva Ltd is the target company for acquisition.
  • The Acquirers are Mrs. Maneesha Singh, Jagsakti Merchandise Private Limited, and Ros Advisory Private Limited.
  • The Acquirers aim to acquire up to 26.00% of Grameva Ltd's total paid-up equity and voting share capital.
  • The offer price is set at Rs. 30/- per equity share, payable in cash.
  • The offer is being made pursuant to the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bangalore Fort Farms Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [GROWW] Fortune First Trust Acquires Shares in Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd. Through Encumbrance
item.description:
The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 for Fortune First Trust. The disclosure is in terms of Regulation 31(1) & 31(2) of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The encumbrance has been created for Fortune First Trust (Promoter Group) on the shares of Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd. The promoters involved are Aditya Birla First Trust Capital Limited (Promoter Group), Rohit Ramlal Parmar, Tanya Gupta, Vikas Singh, Neeraj Mohnot, Ritu Kapse, and Sangam Family Trust.

  • Fortune First Trust has acquired shares in Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd.
  • The acquisition was made through an encumbrance of shares.
  • The promoters involved in the encumbrance include Aditya Birla First Trust Capital Limited (Promoter Group), Rohit Ramlal Parmar, Tanya Gupta, Vikas Singh, Neeraj Mohnot, Ritu Kapse, and Sangam Family Trust.
  • The encumbrance was created on March 13, 2026.
  • The total share capital of Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd. is not explicitly mentioned in the text.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ESARIND] Esaar India Ltd Regularizes Appointment of Mr. Shivanshu Pandey as Director and Re-Appoints Mr. Vaibhav Shastri as Independent Director
item.description:
Esaar India Ltd announced the regularization of Mr. Shivanshu Pandey's appointment as a Director and the re-appointment of Mr. Vaibhav Shastri as an Independent Director for a second term of 5 years. The appointments were approved at the company's meeting held on March 23, 2026. Mr. Shivanshu Pandey, aged 34, brings corporate expertise in governance, strategic decision-making, business management, and organizational leadership. Mr. Vaibhav Shastri, aged 50, has over 25 years of experience in Sales, Marketing and Distribution in the electronic devices industry. Neither director holds shares in the company.

  • Regularization of Mr. Shivanshu Pandey's appointment as Director
  • Re-Appointment of Mr. Vaibhav Shastri as Independent Director for a second term of 5 years
  • Mr. Shivanshu Pandey's corporate expertise in governance and strategic decision-making
  • Mr. Vaibhav Shastri's 25 years of experience in Sales, Marketing and Distribution
  • Neither director holds shares in the company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ESAAR (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ACHYUT] Achyut Healthcare Approves Allotment of 58 Lakh Equity Shares at ₹6 Each
item.description:
Achyut Healthcare Ltd. has approved the allotment of 58,00,000 equity shares at a premium of Rs.5/- per equity share on preferential basis to Promoter and Non-Promoter group. The company has received a total consideration of ₹3,48,00,000/- for the allotment. The new equity shares will rank pari passu with the existing equity shares in all respects. The issued, subscribed and paid-up capital of the Company will increase to ₹24,13,57,000 post allotment.

  • Achyut Healthcare has approved the allotment of 58,00,000 equity shares to Promoter and Non-Promoter group.
  • The company has received a total consideration of ₹3,48,00,000 for the allotment.
  • The new equity shares will rank pari passu with the existing equity shares in all respects.
  • The issued, subscribed and paid-up capital of the Company will increase to ₹24,13,57,000 post allotment.
  • The allotment is in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Achyut Healthcare Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [TATACONSUM] Tata Consumer Products Ltd Closes Trading Window for Q4 FY2025-26 Results
item.description:
Tata Consumer Products Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window from March 25, 2026, in accordance with its Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading. The closure is in connection with the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026, and other related matters. The trading window will reopen 48 hours after the financial results are declared to the Stock Exchanges. The date of the Board Meeting for the declaration of the Audited Financial Results will be intimated in due course.

  • Tata Consumer Products Ltd closes trading window from March 25, 2026, for Q4 FY2025-26 results
  • Closure in accordance with the Company's Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading
  • Trading window to reopen 48 hours after financial results are declared to Stock Exchanges
  • Date of Board Meeting for the declaration of Audited Financial Results to be intimated later
  • Announcement made to designated persons and available on the Company's website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tata Consumer Products Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [GROWW] Thousand Oaks Trust Creates Encumbrance on Shares of Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd
item.description:
Thousand Oaks Trust has created an encumbrance on the shares of Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd. The encumbrance has been made on the shares held by various entities such as Aditya Birla Capital Limited, Rohit Ramlal Parmar, Harsh Gupta, Tanya Gupta, Vikas Singh, Keshre Bansal, and others. The total number of encumbered shares is 2,250,130, which is 0.32% of the total shares of the company. This encumbrance has been created for various reasons such as personal favor, pledge, lien, non-encumbrance disposal, and others.

  • Thousand Oaks Trust creates encumbrance on shares of Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd
  • Encumbrance is on the shares held by various entities like Aditya Birla Capital Limited, Rohit Ramlal Parmar, Harsh Gupta, Tanya Gupta, Vikas Singh, Keshre Bansal, and others
  • Total number of encumbered shares is 2,250,130, which is 0.32% of the total shares of the company
  • Encumbrance has been created for various reasons such as personal favor, pledge, lien, non-encumbrance disposal, and others
  • Disclosure made under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [SEPC] SEPC Ltd Approves Acquisition of Avenir International Engineers and Consultants LLC for INR 1530 Crores
item.description:
🔥 Trending

SEPC Ltd has announced the approval of the acquisition of Avenir International Engineers and Consultants LLC, Abu Dhabi, for a consideration of 90% of AED 708 million, equivalent to INR 1530 Crores. The acquisition, which does not fall under related party transactions, is subject to approval from the Lenders and Shareholders. The acquisition will enable SEPC Limited to expand into the global Oil & Gas sector, strengthen its international presence, and diversify its revenue streams into a high-value and growing industry. Avenir International Engineers & Consultants LLC, established in 2007 and headquartered in Abu Dhabi, specializes in Oil & Gas Engineering, FEED, and PMC services. The company has a strong footprint across the MENA region and an order book exceeding AED 500 million, with reputed clients such as ADNOC and DEWA. It holds ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001 certifications and is an ADNOC- approved vendor.

  • SEPC Ltd approves acquisition of Avenir International Engineers and Consultants LLC for INR 1530 Crores
  • Acquisition to enable SEPC Limited to expand into the global Oil & Gas sector
  • Avenir International Engineers & Consultants LLC specializes in Oil & Gas Engineering, FEED, and PMC services
  • Subject to approval from the Lenders and Shareholders
  • Avenir International Engineers & Consultants LLC has a strong footprint across the MENA region and an order book exceeding AED 500 million

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SEPC Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [EUROMULTI] Euro Multivision Ltd Cancels Board Meeting Scheduled for March 23, 2026
item.description:
Euro Multivision Ltd, in reference to their prior intimation dated 17.03.2026, has announced the cancellation of the Board of Directors meeting scheduled for March 23, 2026. The meeting was intended to consider and approve the unaudited financial results for the quarter and nine months ended on 31st December 2022 and the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2023. The company will inform the Stock Exchanges of the revised date of the Board Meeting as per the prescribed timelines under Regulation 29 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 and other matters in due course.

  • Euro Multivision Ltd cancels Board Meeting scheduled for March 23, 2026
  • The meeting was intended to consider and approve unaudited financial results for the quarter and nine months ended on 31st December 2022 and audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2023
  • Company will inform Stock Exchanges of the revised date of the Board Meeting as per the prescribed timelines under Regulation 29 of SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Euro Multivision Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MRO-TEK] Umiya Holding Pvt Ltd Acquires Shares in Umiya Buildcon Ltd, Holding Increases to 38.14%
item.description:
Umiya Holding Pvt Ltd, a promoter/promoter group of Umiya Buildcon Ltd (formerly MRO-TEK Realty Limited), has acquired shares in the company. The acquisition was made through the open market. Before the acquisition, Umiya Holding Pvt Ltd held 38.13% of the total share/voting capital of Umiya Buildcon Ltd. After the acquisition, the holding of Umiya Holding Pvt Ltd along with PACs has increased to 38.14%. The total equity share capital and total voting capital of the company remains unchanged at 1,86,84,602.

  • Umiya Holding Pvt Ltd, a promoter/promoter group of Umiya Buildcon Ltd, has acquired shares in the company.
  • The acquisition was made through the open market.
  • Before the acquisition, Umiya Holding Pvt Ltd held 38.13% of the total share/voting capital of Umiya Buildcon Ltd.
  • After the acquisition, the holding of Umiya Holding Pvt Ltd along with PACs has increased to 38.14%.
  • The total equity share capital and total voting capital of the company remains unchanged at 1,86,84,602.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MRO-TEK Realty Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [GROWW] Mufasa Trust Discloses Encumbrance of Shares in Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd
item.description:
Mufasa Trust has disclosed the encumbrance of shares in Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd. The trust has encumbered a total of 1,662,179 shares, which is 2.7% of the total share capital. The encumbrance has been created in favor of various entities such as Aditya Birla Capital Limited, Fortune First Trust, and others. The purpose of the encumbrance is not explicitly mentioned in the disclosure.

  • Mufasa Trust discloses encumbrance of shares in Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd
  • Total encumbered shares is 1,662,179, which is 2.7% of the total share capital
  • Encumbrance created in favor of various entities like Aditya Birla Capital Limited, Fortune First Trust, and others
  • The purpose of the encumbrance is not explicitly mentioned in the disclosure
  • The disclosure was made under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd | Category: Deals
